synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23329 Oracle Linux 9 ignition bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23329
description:
[2.23.0-2]
- Build Ignition with GOEXPERIMENT=strictfipsruntime
  Ignition-validate non-FIPS
- Backport https://github.com/coreos/ignition/pull/2159

[2.23.0-1]
- New release
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23329

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23329.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
ignition-validate-2.23.0-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
ignition-grub-2.23.0-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
ignition-edge-2.23.0-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
ignition-2.23.0-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
ignition-validate-2.23.0-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
ignition-grub-2.23.0-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
ignition-edge-2.23.0-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
ignition-2.23.0-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/ignition-2.23.0-2.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2.23.0-2]
- Build Ignition with GOEXPERIMENT=strictfipsruntime
  Ignition-validate non-FIPS
- Backport https://github.com/coreos/ignition/pull/2159

[2.23.0-1]
- New release
